title: Purchasing and Acquisition: Vendor Disclosures and Contracts
description: Conroe ISD follows specific rules when working with vendors and signing contracts to make sure public money is spent responsibly and transparently. Vendors doing business with the district are required to disclose certain information, such as potential conflicts of interest, to help ensure fair and honest dealings. These guidelines protect the community by promoting accountability in how the district enters into agreements for goods and services.
